text: Morning team. I was up late working on a side project. Nothing major.
Romeo, I saw commits to a private repo at 3 AM. Everything okay?
Yeah, just exploring some ideas from the conference. Personal project.
Leave him alone, Benvolio. A man needs his hobbies.
Fine, but the commit messages were all about API gateways. That is not a hobby.
I was prototyping a mesh routing extension. Could be useful for our platform.
See? He is being productive. Unlike some of us who just watch Netflix.
Alright, moving on. Balthasar, how is the fallback PR coming?
Almost done. Found an edge case in the retry logic that I want Romeo to look at.
Happy to review it in our one-on-one later. Anything else for standup?
Friar Lawrence wants an architecture review at eleven. I added it to your calendar.
Perfect. Let us wrap up then. Busy day ahead.
